description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted and elongated human figure, with limbs stretched to unnatural lengths and angles. The head is small and positioned at the end of an extended neck, while the arms and legs are disproportionately long and thin, giving the figure a surreal, almost abstract appearance. The torso is twisted and flattened, with the body appearing to be pulled or stretched in multiple directions. The surface texture suggests a skin-like material, with some anatomical features such as the face and hands faintly visible. The figure appears to be in a crouched or low, dynamic pose, with one arm reaching forward and the legs bent at sharp angles. Overall, the object resembles a warped or glitched representation of a pedestrian adult.
description: A surreal, elongated human figure with stretched limbs and a distorted, crouched posture. The surface resembles skin, with faint facial and anatomical details visible.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the front, with the head and face visible, arms and legs dramatically stretched outward, and the torso twisted.
description_view_1: Side view showing the extreme length of the arm and leg, with the head at the end of a long neck and the body appearing thin and angular.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the head, the stretched limbs, and the unusual width created by the outstretched arms and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the bent legs and the elongated, twisted torso, with the head turned away.
attribute_clothing_type: tight-fitting pants and a short-sleeve shirt
